Run your business from one place, not five apps.

Leads, invoicing, client messages, social media and your blog, sorted. BizBrain is a website and business intelligence tool in one, custom built around your company and brand.

New lead from your website — Thandi M. requested a quote

Five apps. Five bills. Nothing talks to each other.

If you run a hair business, a food business or any side hustle in South Africa, your admin probably looks like this:

  • Leads arrive on WhatsApp and get lost in the chat history
  • Invoices live in Zoho or a spreadsheet you update at midnight
  • Social media posts sit in Buffer, when you remember to schedule them
  • Your website was built once and never updated
  • Every one of these tools charges you separately, in dollars

You did not start your business to do admin across five apps. That is the problem BizBrain removes.

The fix

One app that manages leads, invoicing and social media together

Okiru BizBrain replaces the stack. It is an AI business tool for small business South Africa that keeps everything about your business in one place, and gets smarter about your business the longer you use it.

📥

Lead capture & CRM

Every enquiry lands in one list with a name, a number and a next step. No more lost WhatsApp leads.

🧾

Invoicing

Send professional invoices and quotes in rand, track who has paid, and chase the ones who have not.

💬

Client communication

Follow-ups, booking confirmations and thank-you messages, drafted for you in your tone.

📅

Social media scheduling

Plan a month of posts in one sitting. BizBrain writes drafts around your products and specials.

📝

Blog & content publishing

An AI powered website presence without a web designer. Publish updates and specials your customers can find on Google.

🧠

Learns your business

BizBrain studies your sales, clients and busy periods, then suggests what to do next. That is AI business intelligence working for a small business, not just a big one.

Inside BizBrain

This is what you get: your whole business on one screen

Your own admin portal with a live dashboard, analytics, bookings, contacts, email, blog and an AI content engine. Here is a taste of what it looks like.

Getting started

How it works

1

Register your business details

Tell BizBrain what you sell, who your customers are and how you like to work. Plain questions, no jargon.

2

Connect your accounts

Link your bank and social media accounts so invoices, payments and posts flow through one place.

3

Let it run and learn

BizBrain handles the admin and learns from your data, so its suggestions get better every month.

Who it is for

Built for the business you run, not the tech you know

You do not need to understand tech. BizBrain is built for you: it asks plain questions about your business and does the technical work behind the scenes.

💅

Beauty industry

Salons, nail techs, lash artists, skincare brands and mobile beauticians. Keep bookings, client follow-ups and your Instagram presence running while you work with clients.

🛍️

Selling online

Products or services sold through Instagram, WhatsApp or your own site. Capture every enquiry, invoice in rand and keep content going out so sales do not depend on you posting at midnight.

🚀

Side hustle or main hustle

Really, any business you want to run alongside a job or grow into your main income. BizBrain gives you the guidance and frees up your time, so the admin never becomes the reason you stop.

Case study

Woman of Taste runs on BizBrain

Visit womanoftaste.co.za ↗

Woman of Taste is a South African events and experiences business that used to juggle booking requests on WhatsApp, payments in a spreadsheet and social media whenever there was a spare hour. It is exactly the kind of business BizBrain was built for: excellent at the product, drowning in the admin. The website you see above is BizBrain too: her public site and admin portal are one custom-built system.

Today the whole business runs from one BizBrain admin portal: members, events and ticket bookings, a contact list with newsletter sign-ups, email, blog and social media publishing, an AI content engine, project management and a live analytics dashboard that tracks revenue against monthly targets.

R15 600collected from a single event, tracked end to end
24tickets sold across 18 bookings
75%of booking requests converted to paid
1 placefor bookings, payments, contacts & content

Figures from the Woman of Taste BizBrain analytics dashboard, event: The Devil Wears Prada II.

The maths

BizBrain vs running it all separately

Most small businesses end up paying separately for QuickBooks, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Buffer, Canva, Wix and ChatGPT — and none of them talk to each other. BizBrain is the affordable alternative built for South Africa: one subscription that replaces the whole stack.

What you needPopular toolTypical cost
Invoicing & accountingQuickBooks± R550pm
CRM & lead trackingHubSpot± R350pm
Email marketingMailchimp± R250pm
Social media schedulingBuffer± R250pm
Social media managementHootsuite± R550pm
Design & contentCanva Pro± R220pm
Website & blogWix± R350pm
AI assistant subscriptionChatGPT Plus± R400pm
Running it separately± R2,900pm+
Okiru BizBrain, all of it in one appfrom R999pm

Comparison pricing is approximate, based on entry-level paid plans converted to rand at time of writing. QuickBooks, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Buffer, Hootsuite, Canva, Wix and ChatGPT are trademarks of their respective owners; BizBrain is not affiliated with them.

Questions

Frequently asked questions

Is BizBrain for total beginners?
Yes. BizBrain was built for people who run a business, not people who run software. If you can use WhatsApp, you can use BizBrain. Setup asks you plain questions about your business and does the technical work for you.
Do I need a registered business to use BizBrain?
No. Side hustles are welcome. Whether you braid hair from home, sell food on weekends or run a registered company, BizBrain works the same way. You can add your registration and VAT details later if you formalise.
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes. BizBrain is month to month. There is no contract and no cancellation fee. If you cancel, you can export your client list, invoices and content before you go.
Does BizBrain work on my phone?
Yes. BizBrain runs in your phone's browser and is built mobile first, because most South African small business owners run their business from their phone. There is nothing to install.
What happens to my data?
Your data stays yours. BizBrain stores your client and business information securely, uses it only to run your business tools, and complies with POPIA. You can export or delete your data at any time.
How is BizBrain different from QuickBooks, Zoho or Wix?
QuickBooks does your invoicing, Zoho gives you separate tools you must connect yourself, and Wix builds your website — but each one is a separate subscription that knows nothing about the others. BizBrain gives you one system that already works together: leads, invoices, client messages, social media and your blog share the same information about your business, so nothing falls through the cracks.
Is BizBrain a QuickBooks or Mailchimp alternative?
For most South African small businesses, yes. BizBrain covers the essentials those tools are used for — quotes and invoices in rand, client contact lists and email updates — plus lead capture, social media and a website, all in one app from R999pm. If you need advanced accounting like payroll or SARS e-filing, your accountant can still export your BizBrain invoice data.
Is there a free trial?
No. We offer a demo instead, because every BizBrain system is custom built based on your company and brand. It is a website and business intelligence tool in one, so we walk you through exactly what yours would look like before you commit.
What do I need to get started?
Book a demo and bring your business details: what you sell, who your customers are and how you want to be paid. We then build your BizBrain around your company and brand, and it starts learning your business and doing the admin for you.

Spend your time on the business, not the admin

Join the South African small businesses running leads, invoicing and social media in one app.
